title: astragalus trifoliatus
intro: Astragalus trifoliatus, also known as the Three-Leaf Toadflax or Three-Leaf Milk Vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus trifoliatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, and it can be consumed as a supplement to promote overall health and well-being.
